privileged_info_summary: This task contains a synthetic medication schedule validation problem. The dataset contains 6 medications with specific food requirements, drug interactions, and dosing intervals. Three deliberately planted conflicts exist: (1) Med_A scheduled at 10:00 AM requires food but is outside all meal windows; (2) Med_C and Med_D, which interact with each other, are both scheduled at 12:00 PM; (3) Med_E doses scheduled at 8:00 AM and 2:00 PM (14:00) are only 6 hours apart but require 8 hours minimum. Meal times are fixed at 7:00 AM (breakfast), 12:00 PM (lunch), and 6:00 PM (dinner). The task timeout is 180 seconds with a maximum of 15 steps, and difficulty is rated as medium.
